 F(0) P(1) G(2) A(3) 逞(4) 棘(5) 옰(6) 세(7)

{0x10,0x1F,0x11,0x11,0x17,0x10,0x08,0x00,0x04,0xFC,0x04,0x00,0xC0,0x00,0x00,0x00},/*"F",0*/

{0x00,0x00,0x03,0x1C,0x07,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x04,0x3C,0xC4,0x40,0x40,0xE4,0x1C,0x04},/*"A",3*/

{0x00,0x40,0x42,0x46,0x4A,0x52,0x62,0x42,0x42,0x42,0x4A,0x46,0x43,0x40,0x00,0x00},
